# Descontinued

Now You Can Only Download The Mod(**[Click Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/recycling_mod)**) All The Versions In This Page are Outdated.

<sub>Feel Free To Copy, Distribute, Personal Use And Commercial use.</sub>

## But If I Want To Download The Datapack

You Can But You'll Are Not Able To Download A Datapack With The Content Of The Latest Version.

This Version Is Only Going To Receive A Few Updates And/or Previews


#  Recycling 

A Datapack That Adds Some Recipes To Recycle 

This Data Pack Was Made To Avoid Waste

With This Data Pack You Can Transform Objects That Are No Longer Used In An Item Or Craft An Item That You Will Not Use You Can Uncraft Them And Craft The Needed Item

Example: I Have An Oak Boat But I Don't Need It anymore So, I Transform Them In Five Oak Planks

![Oak_Boat](https://github.com/DEMnetwork/Recycling/assets/105674889/1b314a12-11db-4273-953c-f0ff187a0032)

**Looking For The Latest Mod Version? [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/recycling_mod)**
